title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown demonstrates how complex logarithms can transform Escher's Print Gallery through conformal mapping. The video uses interactive visualization and animations to explain the mathematical structure underlying the recursive art piece, connecting complex analysis to visual geometry.
